props.name: back
props.docs: Choose to display or not the back arrow button

events.docs: Emits when the breadcrumb is changed

styles.name: --mds-breadcrumb-arrow-depth-color
styles.docs: Sets the color of the arrow icon that separates buttons

styles.name: --mds-breadcrumb-button-background
styles.docs: Sets the background color of the button

styles.name: --mds-breadcrumb-button-background-current
styles.docs: Sets the background color of the button when it's active

styles.name: --mds-breadcrumb-button-background-disabled
styles.docs: Sets the background color of the button when it's disabled, is used for arrow button

styles.name: --mds-breadcrumb-button-background-hover
styles.docs: Sets the background color of the button when the mouse is over it

styles.name: --mds-breadcrumb-button-color
styles.docs: Sets the text color of the button

styles.name: --mds-breadcrumb-button-color-current
styles.docs: Sets the text color of the button when it's active

styles.name: --mds-breadcrumb-button-color-disabled
styles.docs: Sets the text color of the button when it's disabled, is used for arrow button

styles.name: --mds-breadcrumb-button-color-hover
styles.docs: Sets the text color of the button when the mouse is over it

styles.name: --mds-breadcrumb-current-button-color
styles.docs: Sets the text color of the current depth button
